subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: People are exerting [great efforts] to extinguish the Light of God. They have written and will write many polemics, as they recently wrote in Tihran.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مردم در صدد اطفای سراج الهی هستند ردیه ای نوشته اند نمیدانند که این ردیه ها باعث انتشار کلمة الله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics
